assertions.description: E-stop circuit with optocoupler-based safety interlock (Q7 NMOS on GND_ISO, SFH617A optocoupler crossing isolation barrier) not identified as a safety/interlock circuit
No SPI bus detected despite ADC081S021 and ADS7822 ADCs communicating via SPI (MISO/MOSI/SCLK lines)
Level shifters TXS0101DCKR not identified in the signal path between isolated and non-isolated domains
Dual CAN bus architecture (MCP2515+CA-IS3052G for CAN0, separate path for CAN1) not described as a redundant/dual CAN topology
REVIEW: TX4139 regulator feedback divider shows input as +12V but R96/R97 ratio gives 8.97V output - the input should be VMOT not +12V for the voltage divider top_net
REVIEW: Isolation barrier lists no isolation_components despite SFH617A optocoupler and LTV-208 dual optocouplers being present in the design
